_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 1-dependent alterations in mouse microglia function are not cell-intrinsic.

_contextSnippet: We observed a clear induction of microglial YFP expression in mice treated with tamoxifen...There was also weak expression of YFP in non-microglial cells, mainly in neuronal cells independent of CreER activation
details: Clear induction of microglial YFP expression following tamoxifen treatment, but also showed weak non-specific expression in non-microglial cells independent of CreER activation
